compiled_state.title: record-test-status.sh: stale RED marker causes false failed status when test goes GREEN
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When a test in .test-index has a RED marker (e.g., source.sh:[test_name]) and the test starts passing, record-test-status.sh writes status=failed with empty failed_tests. Pre-commit test gate then blocks commits with no named failing test. Workaround: remove the marker and re-run with --restart.

comments.body: Duplicate of 1682-ac30 — same root cause (stale RED marker causes false failed status). Closing as duplicate.
comments.author: Test
